title: Oil prices jump after Iran and U.S. attack commercial ships as tensions escalate over Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Crude oil prices surged Sunday, as the U.S. and Iran teetered on the brink of a renewed war after attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Crude oil prices surged Sunday, as the U.S. and Iran teetered on the brink of a renewed war after attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran and U.S. attack commercial ships as tensions escalate
